# Lessons — Engine Discipline Cycle

## META-LEVEL-24 (42nd-layer): Literal-Shell Gate Execution

The 42nd-layer discipline requires that all mechanical gate attestations use
literal shell command execution with captured stdout per D-449(a).

This lesson was identified at the 42nd-layer of meta-level analysis. The
42nd-layer represents the point at which pseudocode gate attestation was
found to be self-defeating — gates that check for pseudocode cannot themselves
use pseudocode to do the checking.

The 42nd-layer closure was confirmed by running literal shell gates in the
pass-74 fix burst, demonstrating the self-application requirement is satisfiable.
